pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point that orients users and routes them quickly to key legal services, tools, lawyers, locations, and information.
primary_functions: Provide clear paths to Practice Areas, Our Lawyers, Book Consultation, Resources, Legal Tools, Locations, and Contact.
Highlight featured services such as Family Law, Employment Law, Estate Planning, and quick links to tools like the NDA generator and fee estimators.
Offer prominent CTAs to book a consultation, estimate fees for common matters, or start building an estate planning package.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on global "Practice Areas" navigation link or homepage CTA to view all practice areas
Click on a featured practice area card (e.g., Family Law, Employment Law, Estate Planning)
Click on a featured service such as "Uncontested Divorce" or "Employment Consultation"
Click "Our Lawyers" promo or CTA to browse all attorneys
Click primary "Book Consultation" CTA on the homepage hero
Click "Read Articles" or "Insights" CTA from the homepage resources section
Click on "Explore Legal Tools" from the tools section
Click "Start Estate Plan" or similar CTA in the Estate Planning promo block
Click "Create an NDA" or the NDA tool card from featured legal tools
Click "Find an Office" CTA in the locations teaser
Click "Contact Us" CTA in the footer strip or hero

access_methods.description: Accessed via the main "Home" link in the header
Default landing page at the root domain

pages.name: Practice Areas Overview
pages.description: High-level overview of all practice areas handled by the firm, with cards that route into detailed pages.
primary_functions: List all major practice areas (e.g., family_law, employment_law, estate_planning, business_law, landlord_tenant) with brief descriptions.
Link users into specific practice area detail pages (practice_area.html?area=family_law, practice_area.html?area=estate_planning, etc.).
Surface key CTAs per area such as 'Learn More', 'View Services', or 'Customize Your Estate Plan'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a practice area card or its "Learn More" / "View Services" CTA
Click "Customize Your Estate Plan" CTA shown on the Estate Planning practice area tile
Click "Find Lawyers" from a specific practice area card

access_methods.description: Accessed from "Practice Areas" header navigation link
Accessed from "Practice Areas" footer link

pages.name: Practice Area Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific practice area (e.g., Family Law, Employment Law, Estate Planning), listing its services and key CTAs.
primary_functions: Explain the selected practice area, common case types, and typical processes for area={family_law|employment_law|estate_planning|business_law|landlord_tenant}.
Display a list of services as cards (e.g., 'Uncontested Divorce', 'Employment Consultation', 'Estate Planning Package') linking to service.html with appropriate serviceId.
Provide contextual CTAs such as 'Book Consultation', 'Customize Your Package' (estate_planning), or 'Estimate Your Fees' for key services.

incoming_params.description: Practice area key (e.g., family_law, employment_law, estate_planning, business_law, landlord_tenant) determining which practice area to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a service card such as "Uncontested Divorce" or "Employment Consultation"
Click contextual "Book Consultation" CTA for this practice area
Click "Customize Your Package" CTA when viewing the Estate Planning practice area

access_methods.description: Accessed via links providing an 'area' query string parameter, e.g., practice_area.html?area=family_law
Linked from Practice Areas overview cards and contextual links throughout the site

pages.name: Service Detail
pages.description: Service-level page for a specific legal service (e.g., Uncontested Divorce) including scope, pricing metadata, and a fee estimator when available.
primary_functions: Present full details of the selected service (serviceId=uncontested_divorce, etc.), including scope, eligibility, and typical timelines.
Offer a service-specific fee estimator section (e.g., 'Estimate Your Fees' with a 'Start Estimate' button and fields such as state, children, property complexity, and budget).
Allow users to calculate an estimated fee and see if their case fits within a specific budget (e.g., uncontested divorce in California under $2,000).
Provide context-specific CTAs like 'Book a Consultation' or 'Contact Us About This Service'.

incoming_params.description: Service ID used to load the appropriate service details and fee estimator configuration (e.g., 'uncontested_divorce').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "Book a Consultation" CTA after reviewing the service
Click on "Contact Us About This Service" CTA

access_methods.description: Accessed via links including a 'service_id' parameter, e.g., service.html?service_id=uncontested_divorce
Linked from practice area pages, featured services on the homepage, or legal tools like a fee calculator

pages.name: Lawyer & Consultation Search
pages.description: Search and filter interface for browsing lawyers and booking consultations, supporting both browsing and consultation-focused workflows.
primary_functions: List lawyers with key details (name, practice areas, office location, hourly rate, rating, brief bio) and support sorting (e.g., hourly rate low to high).

Provide filters for practice_area (e.g., employment_law, business_law), office_location (e.g., chicago), consultation_type (e.g., phone), consultation_length/fee (e.g., free_20_minute_consultation), max_hourly_rate, and minimum_rating.
Support different entry contexts such as general 'Our Lawyers' browsing (view=our_lawyers) and focused 'Book Consultation' mode (mode=consultation).
Allow opening a lawyers detailed profile and booking page (lawyer_profile.html?lawyerId=123) from each card.

incoming_params.description: Determines overall page context such as 'our_lawyers' for general browsing.
Determines search intent, e.g., 'consultation' to prioritize booking-related filters and options.
Preselected practice area filter, e.g., 'employment_law' or 'business_law'.
Preselected office filter to show lawyers in a particular office or city.
Preselected consultation type filter such as 'phone', 'video', or 'in_person'.
Optional maximum hourly rate for pre-filtering lawyers.
Optional minimum rating threshold (e.g., 4.5) for pre-filtering lawyers.
If true, limits results to lawyers offering a free consultation.
Minimum length (in minutes) of a free consultation when require_free_consultation is enabled.
Sort order, e.g., 'hourly_rate_low_to_high' or 'rating_high_to_low'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a lawyer card or name in the search results
Change filters or sorting and apply them via the search/filter form

access_methods.description: Accessed from "Our Lawyers" or "Book Consultation" header links (with different URL parameters)
Accessed from "Our Lawyers" or "Book Consultation" footer links
Linked from practice area pages, about page, or other internal CTAs

pages.name: Lawyer Profile & Booking
pages.description: Detail profile for an individual lawyer including experience, rates, bio, and integrated booking tools for consultations.
primary_functions: Display detailed lawyer information: years_of_experience, practice_areas, office_location, hourly_rate, rating, biography, and specialties.
Provide an availability calendar widget where users can choose a date (e.g., first Monday shown) and time slot (e.g., between 10:00 and 12:00) for consultations.
Offer a booking form capturing full_name, phone, email, consultation_type, and other relevant details, and allow users to confirm booking for a selected slot.
Enable users to 'Save Lawyer' or 'Add to Shortlist' so they can keep track of more experienced or preferred lawyers for later reference.
Support comparison use cases by clearly showing years_of_experience so users can decide which of two lawyers is more experienced.

incoming_params.description: Identifier for the lawyer whose profile should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Search Results" or similar navigation link from the profile page
Click on "View Office Details" from the lawyer's primary office section

access_methods.description: Accessed from lawyer search listing and other pages via ?lawyer_id={id}
Can be opened in a new tab from search results or other internal links

pages.name: Resources & Articles
pages.description: Central hub for articles, guides, and other legal resources, with search and filtering tools.
primary_functions: Provide tabs or filters for different content types (e.g., articles, guides, faqs), with the 'Articles' or 'Blog Posts' tab accessible directly.
Offer a search field and filters to refine content by keyword (e.g., 'non-compete agreement'), topic (e.g., employment_law), time range (e.g., last_12_months), and sort order (e.g., most_recent).
List matching articles with titles, brief summaries, publication dates, and tags, and link to full article pages (article.html?articleId=456).

incoming_params.description: Preselected content tab such as 'articles', 'guides', or 'faqs'. Header link uses content=articles.
Keyword search term for resource titles and content.
Practice area topic filter, e.g., 'employment_law'.
Selected time range filter, e.g., 'last_12_months'.
Sort order such as 'most_recent' or 'oldest_first'.
Filter for the type of content, aligned with Article.content_type (articles, guides, faqs).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an article title or card in the results list
Submit the search form or adjust filters/sorting

access_methods.description: Accessed from the "Resources" header link pointing to resources.html?content=articles
Accessed from the "Resources" footer link
Linked from homepage resources section or contextual "Learn more" links

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full content page for a single article or blog post including metadata and save/bookmark controls.
primary_functions: Display the full article content including title, author, publish date, and related topics (e.g., employment_law, non_compete_agreements).
Provide actions to 'Save Article', 'Bookmark', or 'Add to Reading List' for single-user local storage or on-device bookmarking.
Offer links to related articles or resources to encourage further exploration of similar topics.

incoming_params.description: Identifier for the article to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "Back to Articles" or a topic link under the article title

access_methods.description: Accessed via links including an 'article_id' parameter, e.g., article.html?article_id=123
Linked from Resources listing or featured article sections

pages.name: Estate Package Builder
pages.description: Interactive tool for assembling a customized estate planning package and keeping it within a budget.
primary_functions: Allow users to select specific documents (e.g., last_will, durable_power_of_attorney, advance_healthcare_directive) via checkboxes or similar controls.
Capture client_type (e.g., individual, couple) and state (e.g., texas) to tailor pricing and document options.
Show a running total package price and clearly highlight when the total exceeds a specified budget (e.g., $1,000), prompting users to remove optional add-ons or adjust to lower-tier options.
Provide a 'Continue' or 'Review Package' button that advances the user to the package summary page (estate_package_summary.html) once the package includes required documents and fits within budget.

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected client type, e.g., 'individual' or 'couple'.
Optional preselected state for the estate planning package.
Optional budget constraint used as a reference in pricing messages.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Continue" / "Review Package" once required documents are selected and the package meets budget

access_methods.description: Accessed from Estate Planning practice area CTAs, homepage, or Legal Tools overview

pages.name: Estate Package Summary
pages.description: Review step for the estate planning package before saving the quote, showing documents, add-ons, and total price.
primary_functions: Summarize the selected estate planning documents, client_type, state, and all included add-ons along with the final package price.
Allow users to make minor edits (e.g., remove an add-on) and see the updated total before saving.
Provide actions such as 'Save Package Quote' or 'Proceed Without Payment' to store or advance the quote without requiring immediate payment.
Confirm that the final package meets the users budget constraints (e.g., at_or_below_1000) and includes the specified documents.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Edit Package" or "Start Over" from the summary page
Click "Request Attorney Review" or similar CTA after saving the quote

access_methods.description: Typically accessed after completing selections in the Estate Package Builder

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: General contact and inquiry page for potential clients to submit structured legal questions and disputes.
primary_functions: Provide a structured inquiry form capturing type_of_issue (e.g., landlord_tenant_dispute), user_role (e.g., tenant), amount_in_dispute, state (e.g., new_york), full_name, email, phone, and a free-text message.
Allow users to choose a preferred_contact_method (e.g., email, phone).
Submit the inquiry and display a clear confirmation message that the request has been received.
Optionally provide alternative contact information such as phone numbers and office addresses for immediate assistance.

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected issue type, e.g., 'landlord_tenant_dispute' or 'employment_law_issue'.
Optional preselected user role such as 'tenant', 'employee', or 'individual'.
Optional default amount in dispute or case value.
Optional preselected state based on office location or prior configuration.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Contact" header navigation link
Accessed via the "Contact" footer link
Linked from service pages, office pages, and other CTAs like "Request Attorney Review"

pages.name: Locations & Offices
pages.description: Searchable directory of firm office locations with filters for distance and weekend hours.
primary_functions: Offer a search field for users to enter a zip_code or address (e.g., 94103) and submit to find nearby offices.
Provide filters for distance_radius (e.g., within_10_miles), weekend_hours (e.g., open_saturdays), and possibly practice_area availability.
Display a list or map of matching offices with summary information (distance, address, key hours) and allow sorting by distance (e.g., distance_nearest_first).
Enable navigation to an office detail page (office.html?officeId=some_office_id) from each office card.

incoming_params.description: Optional origin address or ZIP code to pre-fill the search field.
Optional distance radius filter in miles, e.g., 10.
If true, filters results to offices with weekend hours.
Sort order for office results, typically 'distance_nearest_first'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an office card in the search results
Submit or update the office search form and filters

access_methods.description: Accessed from the "Locations" header link
Accessed from the "Locations" footer link

pages.name: Office Detail & Directions
pages.description: Detail page for an individual office location, including full address, hours, and a directions panel with printable instructions.
primary_functions: Show full office details: address, phone number, email (if applicable), office_hours including weekend_hours, and a map preview.
Provide a 'View Directions' or 'Get Directions' button that opens a dedicated directions panel or section within the page.
Allow users to expand or print directions (e.g., 'Print Directions' or 'Expand Directions') so they can view a full route from their starting ZIP or address.
Offer quick links to call the office or view other nearby offices if needed.

incoming_params.description: Identifier for the office whose details are to be displayed.
Optional origin ZIP or address to pre-fill the directions origin.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View Other Nearby Offices" link from this office detail page

access_methods.description: Accessed via ?office_id={id} from the Locations page or lawyer profile links

pages.name: Legal Tools Overview
pages.description: Entry point for self-help legal tools and document generators such as the NDA generator and estate package builder.
primary_functions: List available tools such as the 'Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) Generator' and other document generators or calculators.
Provide short descriptions and use cases for each tool to help users choose the right one for their situation.
Link directly to specific tools like the NDA generator (nda_generator.html) via prominent buttons or cards.

incoming_params.description: Optional slug of a tool to visually highlight, e.g., 'nda_generator' or 'estate_package_builder'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the "Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) Generator" tool card
Click on the "Estate Planning Package Builder" tool card
Click a generic "Fee Calculator" tool that routes into a specific service's fee estimator

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Legal Tools" header link
Accessed via the "Legal Tools" footer link

pages.name: NDA Generator
pages.description: Online form for creating and previewing a customized Non-Disclosure Agreement, including mutual and unilateral NDAs.
primary_functions: Allow users to choose nda_type (e.g., mutual_nda or unilateral_nda) indicating whether one or both parties share confidential information.
Capture party details such as party_1_name (e.g., BrightApps LLC) and party_2_name (e.g., DataCore Inc.), governing_law (e.g., california), and term/duration (e.g., 3_years).
Provide optional clauses such as include_non_solicitation_clause via checkboxes or toggles.
Generate and display an on-page document preview when the user clicks 'Generate Document Preview' or similar, so users can review the NDA before downloading or printing.
Offer optional actions like download_as_pdf or print_document for users who are satisfied with the preview (without requiring authentication).

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected NDA type such as 'mutual_nda' to initialize the form.
Optional preselected governing law state for the NDA.

access_methods.description: Accessed from the Legal Tools overview or homepage NDA tool promos

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the law firm, its mission, values, and key attorneys.
primary_functions: Explain the firms history, mission, values, and approach to client service.
Introduce key attorneys and practice group leaders at a high level with links to the Lawyers page for more details.
Reassure prospective clients with information on credentials, awards, and community involvement.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "Meet the Team" or "View All Lawyers" from the About page

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "About" link in the site footer

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Information about how the firm collects, uses, and protects user data and privacy.
primary_functions: Describe what personal information is collected through the website (e.g., contact forms, booking tools, document generators).
Explain how data is used, stored, and protected, and how users can contact the firm regarding privacy concerns.
Clarify cookie usage and any analytics or tracking technologies in use.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Privacy Policy" footer link

pages.name: Terms of Use
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the website and its content, tools, and resources.
primary_functions: Define acceptable use of the website, including self-help tools and content such as articles and document generators.
Clarify that website content does not constitute formal legal advice and does not create an attorney-client relationship by itself.
Explain limitations of liability, intellectual property rights, and dispute resolution related to website use.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Terms of Use" footer link

header_links.description: Homepage with quick access to all key services and tools
Overview of all legal practice areas and services
Browse and filter all firm lawyers
Search for lawyers and book consultations with filters for practice area, rate, and rating
Access articles, insights, and other legal resources
Browse self-help tools such as the NDA generator
Find office locations near you and check office hours
Submit a legal inquiry or get in touch with the firm

footer_links.description: Learn more about the firm and its background
Browse attorneys by practice area and location
Schedule a consultation with a lawyer
Articles and insights on legal topics
Self-help legal tools and document generators
Find and view office locations and hours
Contact form and general firm contact information
How your data and privacy are handled
Terms governing use of this website
